parse.title: Bloodthirster
parse.wikitext:
{{Item info
|goldvalue = 
|goldefficiency =
|similaritems = Immortal Shieldbow;Ravenous Hydra;Mercurial Scimitar;Blade of the Ruined King;Endless Hunger;Infinity Edge
|background = Unearthed near the marshes of Kaladoun, the Bloodthirster is thought to have belonged to a powerful soulstealer named Frax Van Itt. The wielder of this dangerous weapon is forever bound to the blade and its thirst for the blood of others.
|notes =
* {{sbc|Ichorshield's}} maximum shield value is not affected by [[heal and shield power]].
* {{sbc|Ichorshield}} lasts until broken and does not decay out of combat.
|strategy = 
|trivia = 
* {{ii|Sanguine Blade}} was '''Bloodthirster's''' counterpart on the [[Crystal Scar]] and the [[Twisted Treeline]].
* '''Bloodthirster''' is among a number of items that had the word "The" removed from their names in patch [[V9.19]]. It was previously known as '''''The'' Bloodthirster'''.
** {{Univ|Pentakill|Pentakill's}} second volume, [[Pentakill II: Grasp of the Undying]], named its seventh track after this version of the item.
[[File:Shurima Crest icon.png|link=Universe:Shurima|100px|center]] 
|media = 
<gallery captionalign="center" orientation="square" spacing="small">
Bloodthirster screenshot.png|Ichorshield VFX
</gallery>
|revisions = 
|patchhistory = 
;[[V25.05]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} No longer displays a long-removed ''Bloodthirster Hungers'' debuff in the status bar (which was related to Ichorshield slowly decaying 25 seconds after combat).

;[[V14.18]]
* Life steal reduced to 15% from 18%.
* Ichorshield changed to {{pp|165 to 315 for 11|1;9 to 18}} from {{pp|50 to 400}}.

;[[V14.10]]
* {{sbc|New:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|B. F. Sword}} + {{ii|Pickaxe}} + {{ii|Vampiric Scepter}} + {{g|325}} = {{g|3400}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 80 attack damage, 18% life steal.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Ichorshield:}} Convert excess healing from {{sti|life steal|{{as|life steal}}}} into a shield for up to {{pp|50 to 400}}.
** Limited to 1 '''Bloodthirster'''.
* {{sbc|Old:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|B. F. Sword}} + {{ii|Cloak of Agility}} + {{ii|Vampiric Scepter}} + {{g|600}} = {{g|3400}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 55 attack damage, 20% critical strike chance, 18% life steal.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Engorge:}} While above {{as|70% '''maximum''' health}}, gain {{as|{{pp|10;15 to 40 for 6|1;13 to 18}} '''bonus''' attack damage}}.
** Limited to 1 '''Bloodthirster'''.

;[[V13.17]]
* Engorge health threshold increased to {{as|70% '''maximum''' health}} from {{as|50%|health}}.

;[[V13.12]]
* Total cost increased to {{g|3400}} from {{g|3200}}.
** Combine cost increased to {{g|600}} from {{g|400}}.

;[[V13.10]]
* Life steal increased to 18% from 15%.
* {{sbc|New Unique Passive - Engorge:}} While above {{as|50% '''maximum''' health}}, gain {{as|{{pp|10;15 to 40 for 6|1;13 to 18}} '''bonus''' attack damage}}.
* {{sbc|Removed Unique Passive - Ichorshield:}} Convert the {{tip|healing}} received from {{sti|life steal}} in excess of {{as|'''maximum''' health}} into a {{tip|shield}} for up to {{pp|100 to 400 for 11|1;9 to 18}}, which slowly decays after not dealing or taking damage for 25 seconds.

;[[V13.6]]
* Shield reduced to {{pp|100 to 400 for 11|1;9 to 18}} from {{pp|180 to 450 for 10|1;10 to 18}}.

;[[V13.1b]]
* Total cost reduced to {{g|3200}} from {{g|3400}}.
** Combine cost reduced to {{g|400}} from {{g|600}}.
* Life steal reduced to 15% from 18%.
* Shield increased to {{pp|180 to 450 for 10|1;10 to 18}} from {{pp|50 to 320}}.

;[[V12.10]]
* Shield reduced to {{pp|50 to 320}} from {{pp|50 to 350}}.
* Life steal reduced to 18% from 20%.

;[[V12.4]]
* {{sbc|Undocumented:}} Passive effect renamed to ''Ichorshield'' from ''Blood Barrier''.

;[[V11.23]]
* {{sbc|New Effect:}} Tooltip now tracks damage blocked by Blood Barrier.

;[[V10.23]]
* Updated icon.
* {{sbc|New:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|B. F. Sword}} + {{ii|Cloak of Agility}} + {{ii|Vampiric Scepter}} + {{g|600}} = {{g|3400}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 55 attack damage, 20% life steal, 20% critical strike chance.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Blood Barrier:}} {{sti|Life steal}} from basic attacks can now overheal you, converting the excess {{tip|healing}} into a {{tip|shield}} that absorbs up to {{pp|50 to 350}} damage and slowly decays if you haven't dealt or taken damage in the last 25 seconds.
** Limited to 1 '''Bloodthirster'''.
* {{sbc|Old:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|B. F. Sword}} + {{ii|Vampiric Scepter}} + {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{g|950}} = {{g|3500}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 80 attack damage.
** {{sbc|Unique:}} +20% life steal.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive:}} Your {{sti|life steal}} overheals you, converting the excess {{tip|healing}} into a {{tip|shield}} that absorbs up to {{pp|formula=40 plus 10 per level up to 6, then 20 per level up to 16, then 25 per level|40+10*x for 6;then +20*x for 10; then +25*x}} damage and decays when out of combat for 25 seconds.

;[[V9.19]]
* Renamed ''Bloodthirster'' from ''The Bloodthirster''.

;[[V8.11]]
* Total cost reduced to {{g|3500}} from {{g|3700}}.
** Combine cost reduced to {{g|950}} from {{g|1150}}.

;[[V7.9]]
* Attack damage increased to 80 from 75.

;[[V6.14]]
* Added to the [[Twisted Treeline]].

;[[V5.22]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|B. F. Sword}} + {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{ii|Vampiric Scepter}} + {{g|1150}} = {{g|3700}}.
* Attack damage reduced to 75 from 80.

;[[V5.8]]
* Available on Howling Abyss

;[[V4.12]]
* Life steal increased to 20% from 15%.
* Life steal is now {{sbc|Unique}}.
* Shield strength reduced to 50-350 from 50-440.
* Decay time increased to 25 seconds from 15.

;[[V4.10]] Rework
* Combine cost increased to {{g|1150}} from {{g|850}}.
** Total cost increased to {{g|3500}} from {{g|3200}}.
* AD increased to 80 from 70.
* Life steal increased to 15% from 12%.
* {{sbc|Passive:}} removed.
* {{sbc|New Unique Passive:}} Your life steal effects can overheal you, converting the excess healing into a shield. The shield can block from 50 to 450 damage, based on champion level, and decays if you have been out of combat for 15 seconds.

;[[V3.14#Hotfixes|V3.14]] - November 26th Hotfix
* Combine cost increased to {{g|850}} from {{g|650}}.
** Total cost increased to {{g|3200}} from {{g|3000}}.

;[[V3.14]]
* Combine cost reduced to {{g|650}} from {{g|850}}.
** Total cost reduced to {{g|3000}} from {{g|3200}}.

;[[V3.01]]
* Combine cost increased to {{g|850}} from {{g|650}}.
** Total cost increased to {{g|3200}} from {{g|3000}}.

;[[V1.0.0.152]]
* Combine cost reduced to {{g|650}} from {{g|900}}.
* Base attack damage increased to 70 from 60.
* Passive maximum stacks reduced to 30 from 40.
** Maximum attack damage from stacks is now 30, down from 40.
** Maximum life steal from stacks is now 6%, down from 8%.

;[[V1.0.0.136]]
* Life steal reduced to 12% from 15%.
* Life steal per stack reduced to {{fd|0.2%}} from {{fd|0.25%}}.
* Now only loses half stacks on death rather than all of them.

;[[V1.0.0.108]]
* Now shows you in its tooltip what the current stats on its passive are.

;[[May 15, 2009 Patch]]
* Life steal increased to 15% from 10%.
* Damage cap reduced to 40 from 60.
* Life steal cap reduced to 10% from 15%.
}}
